visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair wearing an orange t-shirt and a woman with a pink hair clip and a striped shirt stand in a paved outdoor area next to a modern grey building. They are laughing and gesturing with their hands as they talk to each other. (2) The man in orange stands against a branded grey wall featuring the FOOMAO logo, gesturing excitedly with both hands toward the camera. Large, bold white subtitles with black outlines appear on screen. (3) The pair enters a building lobby where a large wall mural with Chinese calligraphy and the FOOMAO logo is visible. They meet a middle-aged man in a blue shirt. The man in orange points at the wall and laughs while interacting with the others. (4) The scene shifts to a factory setting. A man wearing a full white protective suit with orange highlights and a face shield is shown inspecting dried mushrooms in a large plastic bag. Close-up shots show the texture of the mushrooms. (5) In the factory, a blue bin filled with peeled white taro roots is shown. The man in the suit and the woman with the pink clip are observing the ingredients. The man gestures toward the bin while explaining. (6) Automated machinery is shown in operation. Large quantities of round, beige meatballs are seen rolling down metal ramps, being sorted by robotic arms, and falling into packaging funnels. (7) Bags of meatballs move along a conveyor belt, being weighed and sealed by machines. The man in orange is seen sitting at a dining table with the factory manager, eating meatballs from bowls and looking amazed as they talk. Several packages of FOOMAO brand meatballs are laid out on the table.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 冬天要到啦. (2) [Subtitle]: 冬天吃火鍋就要吃什麼. (3) [Subtitle]: 貢丸. (4) [Subtitle]: 丸子嘛. (5) [Variety]: 全台灣銷量第一名的丸子. (6) [Subtitle]: 我要近距離看啊. (7) [Subtitle]: 對啊. (8) [Subtitle]: 看這個整個產線. (9) [Subtitle]: 整個這個製作過程. (10) [Subtitle]: 是不是值得信賴啊. (11) [Subtitle]: 姓賴的. (12) [Subtitle]: 是嘛, 你們姓賴的嘛. (13) [Subtitle]: 我們姓賴. (14) [Subtitle]: 哇靠, 真的姓賴. (15) [Subtitle]: 你也姓賴. (16) [Subtitle]: 都姓賴啊. (17) [Subtitle]: 難怪. (18) [Subtitle]: 最值得信賴的. (19) [Logo]: 福茂. FOOMAO. (20) [Subtitle]: 所以要靠人工這樣. (21) [Subtitle]: 一朵一朵把它. (22) [Subtitle]: 看這樣子. (23) [Subtitle]: 這就我們在地. (24) [Subtitle]: 大甲的芋頭. (25) [Subtitle]: 我們是產地直接購買. (26) [Subtitle]: 它直接已經削好過來了. (27) [Subtitle]: 對對對. (28) [Subtitle]: 我們是買整顆的. (29) [Subtitle]: 然後經過我們自己切. (30) [Subtitle]: 加工這樣子. (31) [Subtitle]: 我們內包就是. (32) [Subtitle]: 全部都是. (33) [Subtitle]: 不經人的手碰觸. (34) [Subtitle]: 都是自動機器. (35) [Subtitle]: 然後從秤重到包裝. (36) [Subtitle]: 都是機器自己走. (37) [Subtitle]: 這樣看下來. (38) [Subtitle]: 一天產量大概有多少. (39) [Variety]: 55噸. (40) [Subtitle]: 幾顆啊. (41) [Subtitle]: 這數得出來幾顆嗎. (42) [Variety]: 200多萬顆. (43) [Subtitle]: 有這麼多人吃丸子.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male host in orange, 1 female co-host, 1 brand manager in blue, and at least 2 factory workers in suits.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main male character wears a bright orange t-shirt and has brown hair. The female co-host wears a black and white striped button-down shirt and has a large pink hair clip.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between an outdoor urban area with a modern concrete building, a factory lobby with branded murals, a clean industrial food processing facility with metal machinery, and an indoor dining room with a window view.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced electronic music starts immediately. A high-pitched, excited male voice speaks rapidly, followed by a female voice laughing. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect plays as the male voice emphasizes a point. The background music swells slightly during the transition. (3) The conversation shifts as a new, deeper male voice (the manager) begins providing a professional explanation. The acoustic environment shifts from outdoor open air to indoor reverberation. (4) Rhythmic mechanical thumping and metallic sliding sounds are heard, representing the factory line, while the male host reacts with high-pitched 'Wow' exclamations. (5) The manager's voice remains steady as he explains the taro sourcing, accompanied by the light rustling of plastic bags. (6) A comedic 'pop' sound effect occurs when a text graphic appears. The host's voice reaches a peak arousal level when hearing the production volume statistics, followed by a group laughter track effect.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Factory Tour -> Technical Details -> Consumption Experience
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the brand FOOMAO by demonstrating its large-scale, automated, and clean manufacturing process. The video uses the host's high-energy personality and wordplay on the brand owner's surname (Llai/Trust) to build credibility and entertainment value.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features the brand logo throughout, conducts a factory visit of FOOMAO, and concludes with the host eating and praising the specific products on camera.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-production value social media ad using a popular Taiwanese influencer to bridge the gap between industrial food production and consumer trust.
